name: Acrobat Boots
description: These ethereal boots enhance your agility and mobility, granting bonuses to Balance, Jump, and Tumble checks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases the competence bonus.

name: Adamant Pauldrons
description: These shoulder guards of solid incarnum grant you enhanced protection and damage reduction.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases damage reduction.

name: Airstep Sandals
description: These sandals allow you to walk on air for brief periods.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases duration of air walking.

name: Ankheg Breastplate
description: This chitinous breastplate grants you enhanced natural armor and burrowing abilities.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases natural armor bonus.

name: Apparition Ribbon
description: This ghostly ribbon allows you to become incorporeal for brief periods.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases incorporeal duration.

name: Arcane Focus
description: This soulmeld enhances your spellcasting abilities and concentration.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases spellcasting bonuses.

name: Armguards of Disruption
description: These armguards allow you to disrupt enemy spellcasting with your attacks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases disruption DC.

name: Basilisk Mask
description: This stone mask grants you a petrifying gaze attack.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases gaze save DC.

name: Beast Tamer Circlet
description: This circlet enhances your ability to control and command animals and magical beasts.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases Handle Animal bonus.

name: Behir Gorget
description: This throat guard grants you a lightning breath weapon.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases breath weapon damage.

name: Blink Shirt
description: This shimmering shirt allows you to blink in and out of reality, granting miss chance.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases miss chance.

name: Bloodtalons
description: These crimson claws enhance your natural attacks and allow you to deal bleed damage.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases claw damage.

name: Bloodwar Gauntlets
description: These gauntlets of infernal or celestial power enhance your melee attacks with alignment-based damage.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases bonus damage.

name: Bluesteel Bracers
description: These metallic bracers enhance your armor class and deflect attacks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases AC bonus.

name: Brass Mane
description: This metallic mane grants you enhanced senses and the ability to roar with devastating effect.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases roar effects.

name: Cerulean Sandals
description: These blue sandals enhance your movement speed and allow you to avoid attacks of opportunity.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases speed bonus.

name: Crystal Helm
description: This crystalline helm protects you from mental attacks and enhances your mental clarity.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases mental protection.

name: Diadem of Purelight
description: This radiant diadem allows you to emit light and harm undead and evil creatures.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases light radius and damage.

name: Disenchanter Mask
description: This mask allows you to drain magic from items and creatures.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases dispelling power.

name: Displacer Mantle
description: This shadowy mantle causes you to appear displaced, granting a miss chance against attacks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases miss chance.

name: Dissolving Spittle
description: This soulmeld grants you a corrosive spit attack that deals acid damage.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases acid damage.

name: Dread Carapace
description: This dark chitinous armor grants you natural armor and intimidating presence.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases natural armor and fear effects.

name: Enigma Helm
description: This mysterious helm protects your thoughts and grants you telepathic abilities.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases mental protection and telepathy range.

name: Fearsome Mask
description: This terrifying mask allows you to demoralize and frighten opponents.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases Intimidate bonus and fear effects.

name: Fellmist Robe
description: This shadowy robe grants you concealment and the ability to slip through shadows.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases concealment.

name: Flame Cincture
description: This belt of fire grants you fire resistance and allows you to deal fire damage with your attacks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases fire damage and resistance.

name: Frost Helm
description: This icy helm grants you cold resistance and a freezing touch.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases cold damage and resistance.

name: Girallon Arms
description: This soulmeld grants you additional arms, allowing you to make extra attacks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases attack bonuses.

name: Gloves of the Poisoned Soul
description: These gloves allow you to deliver poison with your touch.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases poison save DC and damage.

name: Gorgon Mask
description: This metallic mask grants you a petrifying breath weapon and enhanced defenses.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases breath weapon save DC.

name: Great Raptor Mask
description: This eagle or owl mask grants you enhanced vision, including superior low-light vision and evasion.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases Spot bonus.

name: Heart of Fire
description: This blazing stone grants you fire damage on your attacks and resistance to cold. Based on the remorhaz.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases fire damage dealt to attackers or on attacks.

name: Hunter's Circlet
description: This ivy-like headband enhances your hunting abilities and tracking skills.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases tracking and survival bonuses.

name: Illusion Veil
description: This veil allows you to create illusions and disguise yourself.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases illusion effectiveness.

name: Impulse Boots
description: These boots grant you enhanced jumping ability and allow you to leap great distances.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases Jump bonus.

name: Incarnate Avatar
description: This powerful soulmeld transforms you into an avatar of your alignment, granting numerous benefits.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases avatar powers.

name: Incarnate Weapon
description: This soulmeld creates a weapon of pure incarnum aligned to your chosen ideal.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases weapon enhancement bonus.

name: Keeneye Lenses
description: These lenses enhance your vision, granting bonuses to Search and Spot checks.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases visual perception.

name: Kraken Mantle
description: This tentacled mantle grants you additional tentacle attacks and swimming ability.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases tentacle damage.

name: Landshark Boots
description: These boots allow you to burrow through earth and stone.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases burrow speed.

name: Necrocarnum Touch
description: This dark soulmeld allows you to drain life energy with your touch.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases negative energy damage.

name: Necrocarnum Weapon
description: This weapon of death-infused incarnum deals negative energy damage.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases weapon power and negative energy effects.

name: Phoenix Belt
description: This fiery belt grants you the ability to be reborn from death like a phoenix.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases rebirth power.

name: Soulspark Familiar
description: This soulmeld creates a familiar-like creature made of pure incarnum.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases familiar abilities.

name: Sphinx Claws
description: These lion-like claws grant you powerful melee attacks and enhanced pouncing ability.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases claw damage.

name: Thunderstep Boots
description: These boots allow you to teleport short distances with a thunderous boom.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases teleport distance.

name: Totem Avatar
description: This powerful soulmeld transforms you into an avatar of your chosen totem creature.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases totem transformation powers.

name: Unicorn Horn
description: This spiraling horn grants you healing powers and the ability to cure poison and disease.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases healing power.

name: Vitality Belt
description: This belt enhances your Constitution and grants you temporary hit points.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases Constitution bonus.

name: Wind Cloak
description: This airy cloak grants you enhanced speed and the ability to fly.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases fly speed.

name: Winter Mask
description: This icy mask grants you cold immunity and a freezing breath weapon.
essentia: Each point of essentia increases cold damage.
